title: ranunculus pyrenaeus subsp. plantagineus
intro: Ranunculus pyrenaeus subsp. plantagineus, also known as the Ranunculus plantagineus, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat a range of health issues, including skin conditions, wounds, and inflammation. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing pain and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Ranunculus plantagineus is often used in the form of infusions, tinctures, or ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
